privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating live, non-synthetic OS telemetry data. All configuration values (such as index 'system_logs', sourcetype 'os_telemetry', interval '60', search name 'Live_Telemetry_Monitor', and event marker 'event_type=live_os_telemetry') are explicitly dictated by the task instructions. The system_logs index is pre-created by the environment setup, and the setup_task.sh script clears any pre-existing saved searches named 'Live_Telemetry_Monitor' and prepares the standard Splunk scripted input directory '/opt/splunk/etc/apps/search/bin/'.
